RemediationStrings.Title: LUKS recovery key is not escrowed.
RemediationStrings.Description: Run 'sudo luksmith enroll' to escrow this device's disk recovery key to the org portal. Until then the device is out of compliance.

RemediationStrings.Title: luksmith agent is not installed.
RemediationStrings.Description: Install the luksmith agent so disk encryption posture can be verified and the recovery key escrowed.
